name: Azazel
fact: Azazel is the former leader of the Fallen Angels who stepped down from his position to promote peace among the Three Factions. He has a massive obsession with researching Sacred Gears and even created his own artificial Sacred Gear.

name: Baraqiel
fact: Baraqiel is the biological father of Akeno Himejima and possesses a unique power that blends holy light with lightning. He deeply regrets being unable to protect his human wife, Shuri, from her clan's executioners.

name: Kokabiel
fact: A warmongering leader of the Fallen Angels who strongly opposed the long peace. He attempted to instigate a new three-way war by stealing Excaliburs and attacking Kuoh Academy before being defeated by Vali Lucifer.

name: Shemhazai
fact: Originally serving as the Vice Governor-General under Azazel, Shemhazai is promoted to Governor-General of the Grigori after Azazel steps down to seal away the monstrous Beast of the Apocalypse.

name: Raynare
fact: Operating under the human identity Yuuma Amano, she dated and assassinated Issei Hyoudou to neutralize his hidden Sacred Gear. She was ultimately destroyed by Rias Gremory after stealing Asia Argento's Twilight Healing.

name: Dohnaseek
fact: A rogue Fallen Angel who dressed in a trench coat and fedora while operating in Kuoh Town. He was killed by Rias Gremory's peerage when they moved to rescue Asia Argento from the church.

name: Kalawarner
fact: A seductive rogue Fallen Angel who assisted Raynare in her plot to acquire Asia's Sacred Gear. She was wiped out by Rias Gremory's Power of Destruction during the church assault.

name: Mittelt
fact: A young-looking rogue Fallen Angel who dressed in Gothic Lolita fashion. She was deployed to stall the Occult Research Club members and was vaporized by Rias Gremory.

name: Tamiel
fact: One of the original high-ranking angels who fell alongside Azazel during the Great War. He works behind the scenes assisting Shemhazai in managing Grigori's modern operations.

name: Penemue
fact: A high-ranking female cadre member of Grigori who possesses a deceptively youthful appearance. She controls complex magic based on numbers and serves as an administrative backbone for the Fallen Angel faction.
